action: Deep audit of autonomous-engine focusing on: (1) confidence threshold consistency across 4 docs, (2) SKILL.md↔decision-agent-prompt.md data flow alignment, (3) checkpoint write competition, (4) SETUP.md path accuracy, (5) missing PROJECTS.md reference. Read 10 files including all hooks, SKILL.md, decision-agent-prompt.md, ARCHITECTURE.md, README.md, SETUP.md, autonomous-state.md.
outcome_evidence: Audit report written to .claude/audits/audit-2026-07-03-004.md with 9 findings (high=2, medium=4, low=2, info=1). All findings verified against live source code via Read tool. Cross-referenced with audit-2026-07-01-009 to confirm zero overlap in new findings.
next_suggestion: Derive route-fix for AE2-H-001 (confidence threshold alignment across README.md + ARCHITECTURE.md + SKILL.md — 3 files, highest priority)
Derive route-fix for AE2-H-002 (save-checkpoint.py Path import — 1 file)

audit_findings.finding: AE2-H-001: Confidence thresholds differ across 4 core documents (OBSERVE: 0-30 vs <40 vs 0-10; SUGGEST: 31-59 vs 40-59 vs 11-30; etc). v2.2 operation-type tiering only updated in decision-agent-prompt.md.
audit_findings.remediation: Align all docs to decision-agent-prompt.md §⑤ as authoritative source

audit_findings.finding: AE2-H-002: find_task_files() uses Path() but import is inside __main__ block at L215. Latent NameError if module imported rather than run as script.
audit_findings.remediation: Move 'from pathlib import Path' to top-level imports

audit_findings.finding: AE2-M-001: SKILL.md Step 4 references consecutive_no_delta field not declared in calibration.json schema or HARD_CONSTRAINTS
audit_findings.remediation: Declare l3_auto_degrade fields in schema.md or HARD_CONSTRAINTS

audit_findings.finding: AE2-M-002: §0.2 and §⑥ give conflicting checkpoint protection steps. 'git stash && git stash apply' is a no-op roundtrip.
audit_findings.remediation: Unify to single authoritative checkpoint flow; remove stash+apply combo

audit_findings.finding: AE2-M-003: incremental-save.py calls save-checkpoint.py via subprocess while both may trigger on Stop event. Concurrent writes to latest.json without locking.
audit_findings.remediation: Add flock or PID-based dedup; or remove redundant subprocess call

audit_findings.finding: AE2-M-004: SETUP.md references non-existent top-level dirs (skills/, hooks/, engine/, watchdog/) instead of actual .claude/ paths
audit_findings.remediation: Align paths to actual repo structure per README.md L119-130

audit_findings.finding: AE2-L-001: §1.5 references PROJECTS.md which does not exist in repo
AE2-L-002: handle_stop overwrites entire autonomous-state.md with 6-line template, destroying user-added content
audit_findings.remediation: Merge-update specific fields instead of full overwrite

audit_findings.finding: AE2-I-001: Mermaid diagram labels watchdog as L5/L6 hybrid; README says L6; matrix table has no level number
audit_findings.remediation: Standardize to L6 across all docs
